summary: Comprehensive security testing completed for ZeroDay.log security upgrade. All backend security features (HTTP Basic Auth, rate limiting, security headers, public/admin endpoints) working correctly. Fixed frontend AuthContext issue preventing navigation. All major security requirements verified.
passed_tests: Admin endpoints protected (return 401 without HTTP Basic Auth)
Admin CRUD operations for writeups working
Public comments with author name field
Frontend navigation works on all public pages
Admin login page shows correctly at /admin
No login/register buttons in navbar (removed as required)
Public writeup voting and commenting forms functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (36/36 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (15/15 core features working)
